addressed_weaknesses: A1: 'nuisance-invariant' framing of DINO/DINOv2/CLIP rephrased as our gloss across §1 and §2.

A3: PMC-15M 'figure-caption' replaced with the abstract's 'image-text pairs from ~4.4M scientific articles'.
A4: MAE/VICReg 'similar ends' replaced with explicit mechanism descriptors.

B2: §G download path attribution corrected (HF coordinate in scripts/, manifest builder in src/derma_jepa/public_data.py).
C1: Appendix A preamble clarifies its role as per-run-ID navigation anchor, with intentional headline-number overlap with §5.
C2: §10 conclusion now explicit that we did not run the full 2x2x2 factorial (4 of 8 cells).
C3: §9 added bootstrap-stratification limitation pointing to Appendix D.
C4: §5 EXP-007 paragraph now bridges single-seed 0.945 and 5-seed mean 0.944 ± 0.003.
C6: §3.5 ends with a bridge sentence forwarding to §4 (Experimental setup).
C7: §7.1 opening reworded to reference §6 explicitly, removing the 'rather than at chance' stutter.
C8: Fig 1 — pixel-L2 label moved below x-axis; contamination caveat annotation repositioned to lower-left of the DermLIP bar.
C9: Fig 2 — EXP-004 / EXP-006a / EXP-006b labels now use leader-line annotations to clearly-separated text positions; placements dictionary records each.
deferred: C-misc: EXP-001 config naming asymmetry (ham10000_hf_mounted.yaml vs *_expNNN.yaml). Cosmetic; not user-visible from paper.
